Q260.question_text: Respondent’s sex (Code respondent’s sex by observation, don’t ask about it!)

Q263.question_text: Were you born in this country or are you an immigrant to this country?

Q271.question_text: Do you live with your parents or your parents-in-law?

options.4: Yes, both own parent(s) and parent(s)-in-law

Q273.question_text: Are you currently (read out and code one answer only):

Q275.question_text: What is the highest educational level that you have attained?

Q279.question_text: Are you employed now or not? If yes, about how many hours a week? (If more than one job: only for the main job)

options.1: Full time employee (30 hours a week or more)
options.2: Part time employee (less than 30 hours a week)

Q281.question_text: To which of the following occupational groups do you belong? (Respondent's current or last job, if unemployed)

options.1: Professional and technical (e.g.: doctor, teacher, engineer, artist, accountant, nurse)
options.2: Higher administrative (e.g.: banker, executive in big business, high government official, union official)
options.3: Clerical (e.g.: secretary, clerk, office manager, civil servant, bookkeeper)
options.4: Sales (e.g.: sales manager, shop owner, shop assistant, insurance agent, buyer)
options.5: Service (e.g.: restaurant owner, police officer, waitress, barber, caretaker)
options.6: Skilled worker (e.g.: foreman, motor mechanic, printer, seamstress, tool and die maker, electrician)
options.7: Semi-skilled worker (e.g.: bricklayer, bus driver, cannery worker, carpenter, sheet metal worker, baker)
options.8: Unskilled worker (e.g.: laborer, porter, unskilled factory worker, cleaner)
options.9: Farm worker (e.g.: farm laborer, tractor driver)

Q284.question_text: Do you or did you work for the government or public institution, for private business or industry, or for a private non-profit organization? (If not currently employed, characterize your major work in the past)

Q285.question_text: Are you the chief wage earner in your household?

Q286.question_text: During the past year, did your family save money, just get by, spent some savings, or spent savings and borrowed money?

Q287.question_text: Would you describe yourself as belonging to the upper class, upper middle class, lower middle class, working class, or lower class?

Q288.question_text: On this card is an income scale on which 1 indicates the lowest income group and 10 the highest income group in your country. Please, specify the appropriate number, counting all wages, salaries, pensions and other incomes that come in.

Q289.question_text: Do you belong to a religion or religious denomination? If yes, which one?

options.0: No: do not belong to a denomination
